ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "frn" REAL /* FRN of the applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant's company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the applicant */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Parent company ID (foreign key to applicants table) */,
  "industry_type_id" INTEGER /* Industry type ID (foreign key to industry_types table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_industry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_type_id") REFERENCES industry_types ("industry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "file_number" TEXT /* File number assigned to the filing */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date the filing was submitted */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Purpose ID (foreign key to filing_purposes table) */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Applicant ID (foreign key to applicants table) */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant submitting the filing */,
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Filing status ID (foreign key to filing_statuses table) */,
  "filing_description" TEXT /* Description of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES filing_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_filing_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_status_id") REFERENCES filing_statuses ("filing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., Biennial, Transfer of control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_numbers" (
  "file_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file number */,
  "file_number" TEXT /* File number assigned to the filing */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the file number belongs to */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* File type ID (foreign key to file_types table) */,
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* File format ID (foreign key to file_formats table) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_numbers_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_numbers_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_numbers_file_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "file_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format (e.g., CSV, XLSX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment file in MB */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* File type ID (foreign key to file_types table) */,
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* File format ID (foreign key to file_formats table) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_attachments_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_attachments_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_attachments_file_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_type_id" INTEGER /* Update type ID (foreign key to update_types table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_updates_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_updates_update_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_updates_update_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_type_id") REFERENCES update_types ("update_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_types" (
  "update_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update type */,
  "update_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the update type (e.g., Update, Delete, Add) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_statuses" (
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing status */,
  "filing_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing status (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_types" (
  "industry_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry type */,
  "industry_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry type (e.g., Media, Telecommunications) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID (foreign key to roles table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Analyst, Applicant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
